chunks.title: The Fragility of Human Life
chunks.reason: Job describes the brevity and turmoil of human existence compared to God's scrutiny.

chunks.title: Comparison of Tree and Man
chunks.reason: Job contrasts the regenerative hope of a tree with the finality of human death.

chunks.title: Hope for Restoration in Sheol
chunks.reason: Job expresses a desire for God to hide him until anger passes and he is remembered.

chunks.title: The Inevitability of Decay
chunks.reason: Job concludes that God's power destroys human hope and leaves man unaware of his family's fate.
